commandRewriteMappings.reason: Directory listings are grouped and compacted before entering the model context.
Large trees are summarized without losing high-signal structure.
File reads keep signatures and relevant lines while trimming boilerplate.
Search hits are grouped and deduplicated for faster reasoning.
Status output is condensed to actionable file changes.
Diff noise is trimmed while preserving code-review context.
History is converted to compact one-line summaries.
Test results emphasize failures and suppress repetitive pass logs.
Build runs return errors and warnings only for quicker remediation.
TypeScript diagnostics are grouped by file with less repetition.
Lint output is grouped by rule and location to reduce token churn.
Container state is summarized into compact rows.
Kubernetes output is condensed and stable for agent consumption.

nativeFallback: prefer focused rg queries before broad file dumps
prefer failure-focused test reporters when available
summarize long logs before hydrating full detail
safetyBoundary: never drop the command that produced output
hydrate full output only when the compact summary is insufficient
